title: CCL - Restore defaults
scenario: CCL setting does not reset to "UC Noise Block" after restoring device defaults via Device Settings > Reset Device > Restore
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a CCL-supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
5. Change the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting to either "No Noise Block" or "AI Noise Block".
6. Return to Device Settings and select "Reset Device".
7. Tap "Restore" to restore the device to default settings.
8. Navigate back to Device Settings > Advanced.
9. Observe the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting.
expected: The Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting should revert to "UC Noise Block" after restoring device defaults.
